dialogos.texto_en: Good morning, Uesugi-kun.
Oh, good morning.
Good morning!\nYou're up early, big bro.
Hah...\nI'm just too excited for our Okinawa trip,\nI even woke up before my alarm went off.
Same here!\nI'm bursting with excitement!
Hey, Yotsuba and Miku.\nMorning.
Good morning.\nWhat about Itsuki and Nino?
I wonder if Ichika was able to get up?
Since Nino's with her, I think she'll be okay.
Come on, wake up already.\nIf you don't get up, I'll leave you behind.
Don't leave me alone...\nPlease help me get up...
Good morning, Nino.\nRough morning, eh.
Good morning, Futaro.\nYou bet.
Geeez, I was going to your room\nto wake you up.\nIchika should have known that.
Sorry...
N-no, don't worry about me.\nI can wake up on my own.
It's not that I'm worried about you.\nI just want to wake you up.
Futaro waking up to me every morning.\nTeehee, that alone makes me happy.
I-is that so?
What about you, Futaro?
I'm...happy, too.
Wow.\nThis lovey-dovey atmosphere in the morning\nreally wakes me up.
Oh, that's good to hear.
Then, should I bring Futaro to our room\nevery morning to wake you up?
No, I'll pass.\nI'll make sure to wake up on time tomorrow.
So much romance in the morning...
Um, you two?\nPlease choose the time and place more carefully, okay?
Yeah, yeah, we get it.
Anyway, after breakfast, we're going to\nKouri Island, right?
How do we get to the island? By boat?
Surprisingly, Kouri Island\nis connected to Okinawa by a bridge.\nSo we can drive there!
The hotel arranged for taxis,\nso let's split up into two groups and head out.
Then, I'll go with Futaro.
As expected, I already knew that,\nso I've already prepared the groups.
In the first taxi, it'll be\nme, Raiha-chan, Nino, and Uesugi-kun.\nIn the second, it'll be Ichika, Miku, and Yotsuba.
Aww.\nI wanted to be alone with Futaro.
Nope. I won't tolerate any changes.
Ahaha, you're like a teacher, Itsuki-san.
Huh?!\nIs that so?\nAm I being too controlling?
Don't worry about it.\nIn fact, it's a relief.
If we left it to Nino, things would be chaotic.
What now?\nAre you telling me that I'm not allowed to be together with\nFutaro?
It's not that, but there's a limit.
You might end up going into your own little world\nand stay there.
Also Futaro is such a pushover.
Th, that's not true?!
Well, he's not weak to everything,\nbut at least he's super weak to Nino's pushing,\nright?
That's not...
It IS true.
Stop it! That's enough!\nLet's hurry up and eat breakfast!
Hey, Futaro!\nWait, the restaurant ain't that way!
